headline: Trump administration prepares up to 100% pharmaceutical tariffs on some imported drugs
summary: The Trump administration is preparing to impose new tariffs on drugmakers that have not struck deals with the president to lower their U.S. drug prices.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Moderna, Raises Price Target to $48
